name: Applesauce Cake Waffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, sugar, and spice in a bowl until thoroughly blended.
2. In another bowl, add slightly beaten egg yolks to the applesauce (mash if needed) and stir well.
3. Gradually add the apple sauce mixture to the dry ingredients.
4. Add melted butter and fold in stiffly beaten egg whites until combined.
5. Pour batter into a waffle iron and cook at a moderately high temperature.
6. This recipe makes 6 waffles.
